parameters.apprise_url_plus: workflows://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.workflow_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.signature_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Microsoft Teams destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise workflows:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose your Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL (webhook.office.com /webhookb2/ connector) from your stored secrets and POST a native MessageCard payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Microsoft Teams incoming webhook (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Microsoft Teams destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Microsoft Teams host

signature_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Microsoft Teams signature

webhook_path_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Microsoft Teams incoming-webhook path (the opaque segment after /webhookb2/); used by the gateway-plus transformer channel

workflow_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Microsoft Teams workflow
